display.name: Bat Cave Emergence
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Thousands of bats spiraling out of a cave at dusk, separation keeping them from collision, strong alignment driving the whole mass out into the open sky.

annotation.technical_notes: An undulating landscape composed of thousands of leaf-like custom shapes is driven by the audio's bass frequencies, creating rolling hills. A low decay rate in the frame feedback loop (sampler_main) preserves the dense, textured structure of the shards. Mid and treble frequencies introduce subtle jitter and scattering among the individual particles.
